perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a man in a white t-shirt and studio headphones sitting in front of a microphone, gesturing while talking. Behind him is a shelf filled with various anime figurines, notably Vegeta from Dragon Ball. (2) A close-up graphic of a 'Uni-President Café Milk' carton appears, illustrating a design detail. (3) The camera cuts back to the man, then to two other individuals sitting across from him—a woman and a person wearing a large, orange-faced traditional mask. (4) Close-up graphics of 'Mine Shine' (麥香) beverage cartons (Green Tea, Black Tea, Milk Tea) are shown sequentially. (5) A specific detail on the Milk Tea carton, a small cow illustration, is highlighted. (6) The video concludes with the group laughing and reacting with exaggerated 'Ooh' expressions while the host points at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice begins speaking in an energetic, inquisitive tone, asking the others if they know a specific fact. Upbeat, fast-paced background music starts. (2) The host explains a detail about the 'Ka' and 'Fei' characters on a milk carton. (3) A female voice and another male voice provide brief responses and reactions. (4) The host continues with a second piece of trivia about the 'Mine Shine' brand, his voice rising in excitement. (5) As the revelation is made, multiple voices are heard shouting 'Ooh!' and 'Wow!' in a synchronized, variety-show style reaction. (6) The audio ends with a mix of laughter and the host repeating the trivia point over the fading music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '你知道嗎' (Do you know?), '瑞穗咖啡牛奶' (Ruisui Coffee Milk) - Hooking the audience with a question and topic. (2) Decorative Text: '咖啡兩個字' (The two words for coffee) - Emphasizing the linguistic trivia. (3) Functional Text: '麥香不是有紅茶、綠茶、奶茶' (Doesn't Mine Shine have black, green, and milk tea?) - Setting up the next fact. (4) Hook Text: '只有奶茶的包裝上面有牛' (Only the milk tea packaging has a cow) - Delivering the 'punchline' of the trivia. (5) Decorative Text: '好無聊喔' (So boring/pointless) - Humorous variety-style reaction text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a fast-paced 'Hook -> Trivia -> Reaction' cycle repeated twice.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male host in headphones, 1 female guest, 1 male guest wearing an orange mask.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main host has short brown hair, wears a white t-shirt with a striped collar, and professional studio headphones.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A podcast-style studio with a grey wall and a metal shelving unit displaying a collection of anime figurines.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Evidence 1 -> Reaction -> Evidence 2 -> Reaction.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to entertain the audience by sharing obscure and 'useless' trivia about popular Taiwanese beverage brands (Uni-President). By using a podcast format with exaggerated reactions, it encourages viewers to verify these small design details themselves, fostering engagement and a sense of shared cultural nostalgia.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed focus on brand packaging and positive/surprised reactions to brand details.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Exaggerated 'Ooh' reaction sound effect, host in studio headphones, anime figurine background.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of 'useless facts' (冷知識) is a common content trope in Taiwanese social media to drive high comment engagement as users debate or confirm the facts.
